note: Importance-weighted conformal (Tibshirani 2019) with an APS nonconformity identical to the marginal pass. Weighting moves coverage but no scheme reaches the nominal 0.90: kNN is the largest mover (+0.022, ~2/3 of the gap, still under-covering), centroid moves down, domain_lr barely moves. The time-split shift is ~orthogonal to the conformal score (see score_shift_corr), so reweighting the calibration scores cannot restore coverage.
